rationale: No new escalation near Romania's borders; Iran deal stalemate and Ukraine war continue without qualitative change; all baselines decay further.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran deal stalemate continues, keeping mild energy cost uncertainty for Romania. No change from prior cycle; baseline continues to decay.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: European defence autonomy is relevant to Romania as a NATO Black Sea member, but remains a long-term discussion with no immediate security impact.

top_events.title: Anti-immigrant unrest in Belfast
top_events.summary: Anti-migrant violence in Belfast is distant from Romania but reflects broader EU migration tensions that could indirectly affect Romanian diaspora sentiment in Western Europe.
